name: Onyx Indoor Golf & Cafe
about: Onyx Golf is a premier, PGA-staffed indoor golf facility located in Lake Forest, California. The venue utilizes Trackman Simulator technology to provide golfers of all levels with precise swing analysis and performance feedback within a comfortable, climate-controlled environment. As an authorized Titleist fitting location, it offers professional club fittings and features WellPutt mats calibrated to simulate outdoor green speeds. Onyx Golf combines state-of-the-art technology with a full-service café and lounge, providing a comprehensive indoor golf experience that includes simulator play, practice, and equipment services.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium Trackman technology for precise swing and ball flight analysis
Professional Titleist club fittings for equipment tailored to your swing
Full-service café and lounge with food, coffee, draft beers, and wine
Realistic putting experience with WellPutt mats calibrated to outdoor green speeds
Climate-controlled environment for comfortable play year-round

food_and_drink.notes: Full-service kitchen offering a diverse selection of delectable foods including bakery items and classic menu options
Full bar service with draft beers, selected wines, and cocktails

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium radar technology with integrated camera systems providing video overlays and detailed swing data

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Bringing your own clubs is recommended, but Titleist club rentals are available for $20 per hour, with men's, women's (left and right-handed), and junior sets.

faq.question: Can I bring outside food or drinks?
faq.answer: No outside food or beverages are permitted on the premises. Onyx Golf offers a full kitchen and bar with a variety of beers, selected wines, and food.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time for 18 holes varies depending on simulator software and pace of play, but typical sessions range from 1-2 hours for full 18-hole rounds.

faq.question: Is Onyx Golf kid-friendly?
faq.answer: While not specifically marketed as kid-friendly, Onyx Golf welcomes junior golfers with available junior club rentals and provides a comprehensive golfing experience suitable for various ages.
